situational_context: Recovery week absorbed successfully. ACWR resolved from 1.35 to 0.94 (safe band). Running comeback day 48, 10 runs completed (Run #10 on Jun 14 was the last). Readiness at period-best: training readiness 93, body battery 54, HRV BALANCED. 6 days of running rest since Run #10 has allowed tissue recovery. Extreme heat wave in Paris (35-40C Jun 20-26) is the dominant constraint — all outdoor sessions require heat-adapted protocols. Weight trending down steadily (102.62 kg on Jun 7, next weigh-in Jun 21). E-bike remains primary mobility modality. No pain signals reported. Protein intake consistently below target (121g vs 150g). Vitamin D retest due July 2026.

recommendations.text: Heat wave protocol: all outdoor sessions at reduced intensity. FC ceiling -7 bpm at 35C, -10 bpm at 38C+. Hydration >=500 mL per run, >=750 mL per bike. Prefer shaded routes (Bois de Vincennes). Cancel if temperature >42C at session start.
recommendations.measurable: No session with avg HR above heat-adjusted ceiling; no heat-related symptoms

recommendations.text: Increase protein to >=150g/day. Current 7d avg is 121g (81% of target). At 102.6 kg in running comeback + moderate deficit, tendon collagen remodeling requires >=1.6 g/kg lean mass/day. Add ~30g protein at dinner.

Book Vitamin D + CBC blood panel before July 15. Vitamin D was 27 ng/mL in December (insufficient). At 8 weeks into running comeback at 102.6 kg, confirming >=40 ng/mL is critical for stress fracture prevention.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after Run #12 or #13 triggers skip of next run
markers_to_watch.reason: Tissue tolerance bottleneck at 102.6 kg; 6 days rest should have allowed good tissue adaptation

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any nausea, dizziness, confusion, or excessive HR drift during outdoor session triggers immediate stop and 48h rest
markers_to_watch.reason: 35-40C heat wave all week; exertional heat illness risk elevated at 102.6 kg

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV 7d avg drops below 32 ms
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 36 ms (stable). Sustained drop would signal accumulated fatigue or heat stress
